local function INTERP()

    local _ZDGslTwSLEUG = 'ZZVtgQWuhMhz'
    local LocalPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
    local isHooked = false
    
    -- 보안 검사
    if debug.getinfo(loadstring).what ~= "C" then 
        isHooked = true 
    end
    
    local _KWVtqKIABigH = 'SDxMNGEmyeMk'
    if isHooked then
        if LocalPlayer then 
            LocalPlayer:Kick("[VM SYSTEM] Security Violation: Hooking/Debugger detected.") 
        end
        return
    end

    local VM = jhoihVIRhbyN    local data = VM._DATA
    local k = VM._K
    local masterKey = k[1]
    local memSeed = k[2]
    local totalLen = k[3]

    local mapping = {}
    
    for i = 1, totalLen do 
        mapping[i] = i 
    end

    local current = memSeed
    
    local function lcg(min, max)
        current = (current * 1103515245 + 12345) % 0x80000000
        return min + (current % (max - min + 1))
    end

    local _qnsawEJqcGvN = 'OXcXoCrpADOa'
    for i = totalLen, 2, -1 do
        local j = lcg(1, i)
        mapping[i], mapping[j] = mapping[j], mapping[i]
    end

    local key = masterKey
    local prev = 107
    local ip = 1
    local buf = {}

    while ip <= totalLen do
        local phys = mapping[ip]
        local enc = data[phys]

        key = bit32.band(bit32.bxor(key, prev) + ip, 0xFF)
        local dec = bit32.bxor(enc, key)

        buf[#buf+1] = string.char(dec)
        
        prev = dec
        ip = ip + 1
    end
    
    bit32.bxor(110, 201)
    local src = table.concat(buf)
    
    local f = loadstring(src)
    
    if f then 
        pcall(f) 
    end
end

INTERP()
